narrative:
Cuyahoga Falls City has 35,417 registered voters, with 57.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 17.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 24.9%, a clear Democratic lean of 7.2 percentage points.
